summary:
GEOGRAPHICAL READ
India activity concentrates in Colo layer (265 signals) and Build layer (16 signals), with Tamil Nadu (Sify), Delhi (Nxtra), Maharashtra (NTT, Tata, Reliance, Web Werks), Telangana (Yotta), Gujarat (AdaniConnex), Karnataka (Google) as key states. GCC movements show UAE leading in Colo (5 signals) and Build (7 signals), Saudi Arabia strongest in Power (2 signals) and Build (4 signals), Qatar and Oman each with 1 Power signal, Bahrain and Kuwait with Build signals (2 each). Whitespace targets active in GCC with no India entity: center3 (GCC; SA), Khazna (GCC), Ooredoo (GCC).

POLICY READ
India policy tailwinds: three regulation notices on attachment of bank and demat accounts (AP Nos. 15504-15509) indicating financial enforcement actions relevant to market entry compliance. Saudi Arabia shows strongest policy tailwind with 11 regulation items including cloud growth, AI innovation, Hajj data center shifts, and construction surge. Kuwait has 1 regulation item on company suspensions. UAE, Qatar, Bahrain, Oman show no policy signals.

COMMERCIAL READ
India leads in Colo (252 signals) and Build (1 signal) layers per commercial heatmap. UAE leads in Compute (2 signals). Saudi Arabia leads in Power (1 signal) and Build (1 signal). Qatar has 1 Power signal. India entities: Sify (Colo, Tamil Nadu), Nxtra (General, Delhi), NTT India (Maharashtra), Yotta (Telangana), AdaniConnex (Gujarat), Google (Karnataka), Reliance (Maharashtra), Tata Communications (Maharashtra), Oracle (Delhi), Web Werks (Maharashtra). Top India actors per OSINT: Sify Technologies Limited (29 job postings), National Internet Exchange of India (23), Ishan Netsol Pvt Ltd (19), CtrlS Datacenters Ltd (18), Nxtra Data Ltd (14).

RANKED INDIA OPPORTUNITIES
1. center3; why-now: active in GCC (Saudi Arabia focus) with score 52.3, no India entity; cross-signal: GCC activity + whitespace targeting; TAG play: India market-entry; evidence: ev=0223d872de10, 79fd79d26e0a, c91f9bae49fe, b8ff3f8e9923, 6ea4c9dde3eb, 94c55c554538, 466ef9dd1e65, 8eaa1b1ce927
2. Khazna; why-now: active in GCC with score 29.1, no India entity; cross-signal: GCC pure-play + whitespace targeting; TAG play: India market-entry; evidence: ev=22adcfd4827d, fea47dc31d37, 570e37d184fe, a66f48d6b613, 35ccdcaa1008, 916350246e8f, d74a650ed308, 7bb631daeba8
3. Ooredoo; why-now: active in GCC with score 25.4, no India entity; cross-signal: GCC activity + whitespace targeting; TAG play: India market-entry; evidence: not in data (Ooredoo signals not listed in TOP PROSPECTS ev list, but implied by whitespace)
4. CtrlS; why-now: active in India (score 35.9, unresolved CIN) with rising OSINT job postings (18); cross-signal: India entity filing momentum + hiring spike; TAG play: India partnership / government-affairs; evidence: cin= (unresolved), ev=8031780bae1e, 2d2e44f68cdd, 5c16e38b7910, 86c9cfef3386, 439f740d3a33, 3177f4f8489b, 39471e6ed1fb, a81184f81bc4
5. Sify; why-now: top momentum (score 9.34 per heatmap note, 77.7 in TOP PROSPECTS), active in India (Colo layer, Tamil Nadu), high filing volume; cross-signal: India Colo leadership + policy attachment notices relevance; TAG play: India government-affairs; evidence: cin=U72200TN1995PLC050809, ev=341f0dc0b422, 0001554855-26-001437, 0001554855-26-000600, 0001575872-26-000022, 0001575872-25-000666, 0001575872-25-000646, 49dd2464fa3e, 594d534e0c59

— Grounding set (companies in sheet): ADANICONNEX PRIVATE LIMITED, AdaniConneX, CtrlS, GOOGLE INDIA PRIVATE LIMITED, Khazna, NTT, NTT INDIA PRIVATE LIMITED, NXTRA DATA LIMITED, Nxtra, ORACLE INDIA PRIVATE LIMITED, Ooredoo, PRINCETON DIGITAL INDIA PRIVATE LIMITED, RELIANCE LIMITED, SIFY TECHNOLOGIES LIMITED, Sify, TATA COMMUNICATIONS LIMITED, WEB WERKS INDIA PRIVATE LIMITED, YOTTA TECHNOLOGIES PRIVATE LIMITED, Yotta, center3
